title: Circle Map
author: Unknown
message: Starts next to gazebo and circles as long as trigger is held.

title: Gazebo Branch
author: Unknown
message: Starts near Gazebo and loops around the map.

title: Long Walls and Branches
author: Unknown
message: Starts on top of Stump and branches with wall runs throughout the map.

title: Mqtking Double Walls
author: Unknown
message: Starts on double walls and circles map.

title: Slide Juke
author: Unknown
message: Starts between double walls and performs a slide juke.
